name: Concia
recipeIngredient: 6 tablespoons fresh thyme, oregano, or marjoram, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the eggplant (or zucchini) into 3/8-inch-thick slices.
2. Brush the vegetables with olive oil.
3. Grill until golden brown, about 10 minutes for eggplant and 6-8 minutes for zucchini.
4. Arrange a layer of grilled vegetables in a clean glass jar or dish with a lid.
5. Sprinkle salt, pepper, shaved garlic, and herbs over the vegetables.
6. Repeat steps 3-5 until all vegetables are used.
7. Pour remaining olive oil and vinegar over the vegetables.
8. Refrigerate for one week. Turn the container daily.
